name: @sidekick/web
description: @sidekick/web — the human-facing, read-only observability dashboard (Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui). Visualizes the per-block loop: skew vs cap, funding rate, the nanopayment settlement stream, smooth decrement. NOT a trading chart. Scaffolded in Phase 7.

scripts.//: Next.js app is initialized in Phase 7 (next dev / build / start land here).
